name: smugglers hold inside ship
description: I'm in a smugglers hold inside ship
hints: The smuggler's hold is the treasure room! This is where you store treasures for points. There's a pool of water and a narrow crawlway.
DROP treasures here to score points. The crawlway leads further into the ship. GO SEA enters the water through the pool.

This is the treasure storage room (room 13). DROP all *treasures* here and SCORE to check progress. GO CRAWLWAY leads to the narrow crawlway (room 20). GO SEA exits through the pool to the sea (room 11).
Store all 13 treasures here for maximum score. GO CRAWLWAY to access the ship's hold. GO SEA goes to the water but drops your items.
notes: TREASURE ROOM. Drop all 13 treasures here and SCORE. Contains a pool of water (GO SEA exits to room 11 but drops items) and a narrow crawlway (GO CRAWLWAY leads to room 20). This is the target destination for all collected treasures.
